name: asc-marketing-manager
description: API-aware workflows for dry-running and syncing localized App Store Connect text metadata and screenshots.

interface.shortDescription: Dry-run and sync localized App Store Connect metadata and screenshots with API-aware safety.
interface.longDescription: ASC Marketing Manager gives Codex focused knowledge of the App Store Connect API for localized text metadata and screenshot assets. It turns Google Sheets or desired-state JSON into a validated dry run, can create a missing editable app version when requested, and applies only explicitly reviewed changes for names, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, URLs, What's New, promotional text, App Review fields, and localized screenshot sets.
defaultPrompt: Compare my localization sheet with App Store Connect before release.
Create a dry run for version 2.3 using my App Store copy sheet.
Dry-run replacing my localized screenshot sets from this asset folder.
